00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/common.hpp"
00007 #include "sprite/payloads.hpp"
00008 #include "sprite/pointer.hpp"
00009 #include <boost/utility.hpp>
00010 #include <boost/range/iterator_range.hpp>
00011 
00017 #define SPRITE_INPLACE_BOUND 3
00018 
00024 #define SPRITE_REWRITE_ARG_BOUND 5
00025 
00026 namespace sprite
00027 {
00028   // =============
00029   // Forward defs.
00030   // =============
00031   template<TagValue> struct rewrite;
00032   template<typename Payload> struct Node_;
00033   namespace visitors { struct Clone; }
00034 
00078   struct Node
00079   {
00080     // ====== Data accessors. ======
00081 
00083     uint32 refcount() const { return this->m_refcount; }
00084 
00086     TagValue tag() const { return this->m_tag; }
00087 
00089     uint32 id() const { return this->m_id; }
00090 
00092     uint32 arity() const { return this->m_arity; }
00093 
00094     // ====== Abstract Object Management. ======
00095 
00101     NodePtr clone();
00102 
00104     #define F(z,n,_)                                                         \
00105         template<TagValue Value BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(n,typename T)> \
00106         static NodePtr create(BOOST_PP_ENUM_BINARY_PARAMS(n,T,const & t));   \
00107         
00108     BOOST_PP_REPEAT(SPRITE_REWRITE_ARG_BOUND,F,)
00109     #undef F
00110 
00112     void * _payload() { return this + 1; }
00113     void const * _payload() const { return this + 1; }
00114 
00115   private:
00116 
00117     // ====== Object management. ======
00118 
00119     // Everything in this section is private.  Use the abstract interface (above)
00120     // to manage nodes.
00121 
00122     friend struct visitors::Clone; // Needs constructors.
00123     template<typename> friend struct Node_; // Needs ~Node.
00124     template<TagValue> friend struct rewrite; // Needs destroy_payload.
00125 
00127     Node() : m_refcount(0) {}
00128 
00130     Node(Node const & x)
00131       : m_refcount(0), m_tag(x.m_tag), m_id(x.m_id), m_arity(x.m_arity)
00132     {}
00133 
00135     Node & operator=(Node const & x)
00136     {
00137       this->m_tag = x.m_tag;
00138       this->m_id = x.m_id;
00139       this->m_arity = x.m_arity;
00140       return *this;
00141     }
00142 
00144     void destroy_payload();
00145 
00147     ~Node() { this->destroy_payload(); }
00148 
00150     void * operator new(size_t bytes);
00151 
00153     void operator delete(void *);
00154 
00155   public:
00156 
00157     // ====== Child access. ======
00158 
00160     typedef boost::iterator_range<NodePtr *> range_type;
00161 
00163     typedef boost::iterator_range<NodePtr const *> const_range_type;
00164 
00166     range_type iter();
00167 
00169     const_range_type iter() const;
00170 
00172     NodePtr & operator[](size_t i);
00173 
00175     NodePtr const & operator[](size_t i) const;
00176 
00182     size_t position(NodePtr const & child) const;
00183 
00184   private:
00185 
00186     // ====== Smart pointer support. ======
00187 
00189     friend void intrusive_ptr_add_ref(Node * node)
00190       { ++node->m_refcount; }
00191 
00193     friend void intrusive_ptr_release(Node * node)
00194       { if(--node->m_refcount == 0) { delete node; } }
00195 
00196   private:
00197 
00198     // ====== Data members. ======
00199 
00200     uint32 m_refcount;
00201     TagValue m_tag : 32;
00202     uint32 m_id;
00203     uint32 m_arity;
00204   };
00205 
00206   // Implementation of NodePtr::operator[] (relies on definition of Node).
00207   inline NodePtr & NodePtr::operator[](size_t i) const { return (**this)[i]; }
00208 
00209   // Implementation of NodePtr::operator= (relies on definition of Node).
00210   inline NodePtr & NodePtr::operator=(Node & node)
00211     { return (*this = NodePtr(&node)); }
00212 
00216   template<typename Payload> struct Node_ : Node
00217   {
00218     typedef Payload payload_type;
00219     Payload payload;
00220   };
00221 
00228   size_t const NODE_BYTES = 32;
00229 
00230   // Aliases for the complete node types.
00231 
00233   typedef Node_<payloads::Unused<> > AbstractNode;
00234   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(AbstractNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00235 
00237   typedef Node_<payloads::InPlace<0> > InPlaceNode0;
00238   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlaceNode0) == NODE_BYTES);
00239 
00241   typedef Node_<payloads::InPlace<1> > InPlaceNode1;
00242   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlaceNode1) == NODE_BYTES);
00243 
00245   typedef Node_<payloads::InPlace<2> > InPlaceNode2;
00246   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(InPlaceNode2) == NODE_BYTES);
00247 
00249   typedef Node_<payloads::ChildList> ChildListNode;
00250   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(ChildListNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00251 
00253   typedef Node_<payloads::Choice> ChoiceNode;
00254   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(ChoiceNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00255 
00262   typedef Node_<payloads::Fwd> FwdNode;
00263   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(FwdNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00264 
00266   typedef Node_<payloads::Int> IntNode;
00267   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(IntNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00268 
00270   typedef Node_<payloads::Float> FloatNode;
00271   BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(FloatNode) == NODE_BYTES);
00272 
00273  
00275   inline bool skip_fwd_ref(NodePtr & ptr, Node & ref)
00276   {
00277     if(ref.tag() == FWD)
00278     {
00279       ptr = static_cast<FwdNode &>(ref).payload.dest;
00280       return true;
00281     }
00282     return false;
00283   }
00284 
00285 
00286   namespace meta
00287   {
00301     template<sprite::TagValue,size_t Arity=-1> struct NodeOf;
00302     template<> struct NodeOf<FAIL,-1> : mpl::identity<AbstractNode> {};
00303     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,-1> : mpl::identity<ChildListNode> {};
00304     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,0> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode0> {};
00305     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,1> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode1> {};
00306     template<> struct NodeOf<OPER,2> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode2> {};
00307     template<size_t N> struct NodeOf<OPER,N> : NodeOf<OPER,-1> {};
00308     template<> struct NodeOf<CHOICE,-1> : mpl::identity<ChoiceNode> {};
00309     template<> struct NodeOf<FWD,-1> : mpl::identity<FwdNode> {};
00310     template<> struct NodeOf<INT,-1> : mpl::identity<IntNode> {};
00311     template<> struct NodeOf<FLOAT,-1> : mpl::identity<FloatNode> {};
00312     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,-1> : mpl::identity<ChildListNode> {};
00313     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,0> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode0> {};
00314     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,1> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode1> {};
00315     template<> struct NodeOf<CTOR,2> : mpl::identity<InPlaceNode2> {};
00316     template<size_t N> struct NodeOf<CTOR,N> : NodeOf<CTOR,-1> {};
00317   }
00318 }
00319 
00320 #include "sprite/detail/node_impl.hpp"
